name: EDO
description: TV outcomes measurement platform using Vertical AI to link linear and streaming ads to consumer engagement and app-store behavior.

seo.title: EDO — Mobile Attribution / MMP
seo.meta_description: EDO: TV outcomes measurement platform using Vertical AI to link linear and streaming ads to consumer engagement and app-store behavior.

when_to_use: TV ad attribution linking linear/streaming spots to App Store install spikes
Measuring engagement lift from TV campaigns on 83M connected TVs
Correlating CTV ad exposure with app download and in-app conversion events
Cross-screen TV-to-mobile attribution for brand and performance advertisers

pros: Links TV ads to app store and search behavior
Vertical AI tuned specifically to TV outcomes
Covers linear plus streaming in one view
Useful for connecting brand TV spend to mobile KPIs
cons: Focused on TV outcomes, not app UA fundamentals
Limited value if TV is not a channel
Narrow methodology compared with full MMM
review.verdict: Strong niche tool connecting TV spend to app behavior, but not a replacement for an MMP or MMM.
review.best_for: Brands running linear or streaming TV wanting to tie spots to app and search lift.
review.not_for: App marketers with no TV budget or who need SKAN-grade install attribution.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone, no explicit peak-lock evidence
